tasks_completed.description: Appended AC17, AC18, AC19 entries to active_tests[] in manifest.json

git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Appended the 3 missing manifest entries so the test runner discovers all 19 tests

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: All 39 lines are the required JSON entries for 3 test registrations; no overage
